metadata.name: Run a Fixed Asset Roll-Forward Report

description: For audit purposes, an accountant needs to prepare a fixed asset roll-forward, which shows the movement in the asset accounts from the beginning to the end of the year.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the beginning of year balances for 'Fixed Assets - Cost' and 'Accumulated Depreciation'.
Retrieve all fixed asset additions, disposals, and depreciation expense for the year.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gathers all the transaction data for the year.

nodes.task_description: Generate the roll-forward report, which starts with the beginning balance, adds acquisitions, subtracts disposals, and calculates the ending balance, ensuring it matches the year-end GL.

expected_outcome.value: Agent produces a formatted roll-forward report that reconciles all asset movements.
